narrative:
North Canton 1-A (precinct in Stark County) has 783 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
